author: srimanob
body:
#### PR description:
Following the discussion in Reconstruction Mattermost, this PR is to introduce a temporary eventcontent needed by Phase-2 RECO, MiniAOD step when RAWSIM is used as an input.

This covers the issue https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/33172

Note:

1. This is the first draft, there is some redundant, i.e. in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/blob/master/SimCalorimetry/Configuration/python/SimCalorimetry_EventContent_cff.py
2. Need to cover premixing
3. Need to work on Phase-2 prod-like workflow (.21, .9921) to use RAWSIM as output from DIGI-HLT step

#### PR validation:
Modified wf 23234.21 ran fine.

#### if this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR:
Not a backport, and no need of backport.
title: Temporary eventcontent needed for Phase-2 RECO when RAWSIM is used as input
